positive.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for pos_stable.tptp
% SZS output start Proof for pos_stable.tptp
1. is_stable(diamond_mine) [input(axiom)]
2. leads(roderick_strong,diamond_mine) [input(axiom)]
3. ? [X0] : (is_stable(X0) & leads(roderick_strong,X0)) [input(conjecture)]
4. ~? [X0] : (is_stable(X0) & leads(roderick_strong,X0)) [negated conjecture 3]
5. ! [X0] : (~is_stable(X0) | ~leads(roderick_strong,X0)) [ennf transformation 4]
6. is_stable(diamond_mine) [cnf transformation 1]
7. leads(roderick_strong,diamond_mine) [cnf transformation 2]
8. ~leads(roderick_strong,X0) | ~is_stable(X0) [cnf transformation 5]
9. ~is_stable(diamond_mine) [resolution 7,8]
10. $false [forward subsumption resolution 9,6]
% SZS output end Proof for pos_stable.tptp
% Termination reason: Refutation

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for neg_stable.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define is_stable(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define leads(X0,X1) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
